goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'cambridge museum of technology'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should 'leave after 14:00' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called cambridge museum of technology
Make sure you get area and postcode
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to london liverpool street
The train should leave after 14:00 and should leave on monday
Make sure you get arrival time
